Class POSPanel.ButtonEditor

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.AbstractCellEditor
javax.swing.DefaultCellEditor
POSPanel.ButtonEditor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, CellEditor, TableCellEditor, TreeCellEditor
Enclosing class:
POSPanel
private class POSPanel.ButtonEditor extends DefaultCellEditor
Custom table cell editor that allows button interaction within a JTable cell.

The editor tracks the clicked state and the row being edited to handle user interactions appropriately.

  • Constructor Details

    • ButtonEditor

      public ButtonEditor(JCheckBox checkBox)
      Constructs a ButtonEditor using the specified checkbox component.
      Parameters:
      checkBox - the checkbox component required by DefaultCellEditor

  • Method Details

    • getTableCellEditorComponent

      public Component getTableCellEditorComponent(JTable table, Object value, boolean isSelected, int row, int column)
      Returns the component used for editing a table cell as a button.
      Specified by:
      getTableCellEditorComponent in interface TableCellEditor
      Overrides:
      getTableCellEditorComponent in class DefaultCellEditor
      Parameters:
      table - the JTable requesting the editor
      value - the value of the cell being edited
      isSelected - whether the cell is selected
      row - the row index of the cell
      column - the column index of the cell
      Returns:
      the button component used for editing the cell

    • getCellEditorValue

      public Object getCellEditorValue()
      Returns the value of the cell editor and performs the associated action.
      Specified by:
      getCellEditorValue in interface CellEditor
      Overrides:
      getCellEditorValue in class DefaultCellEditor
      Returns:
      the value of the cell editor, typically 'add'
